enum_values.name: UseNewDraftAngleAnalysisUi
enum_values.summary: UseNewDraftAngleAnalysisUi bool Value, defaults to true

enum_values.name: UseCompressionWhenSaving
enum_values.summary: Use compressed buffers when saving 3dm files (default is true).

enum_values.name: TestAdvancedString
enum_values.summary: String value, defaults to "test string"

enum_values.name: TestAdvancedInt
enum_values.summary: Integer value, defaults 123

enum_values.name: PdfOptionalContentGroups
enum_values.summary: How optional content should be included when exporting PDF files

enum_values.name: LeaveFloatingPanelsHiddenOnMac
enum_values.summary: Bool value used on Mac to satisfy a user request to hide floating stuff when a command starts and leave it hidden when the command ends. This is false by default. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-57945

enum_values.name: DisableFileWatchers
enum_values.summary: Disable file watchers, using to diagnose Mac Rhino mystery crashes https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-52805

enum_values.name: EnableCheckForUpdates
enum_values.summary: Auto check for update, enabled by default on Mac, does not show up in Windows https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-60427

enum_values.name: LeftJustifyNumericText
enum_values.summary: Mainly an issue on Windows; there are different numeric controls scattered across the product and no consistent text alignment. This is an attempt to provide a way to control the preferred alignment style.

enum_values.name: EnableWindowsGestures
enum_values.summary: https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62173 Disable gestures for Windows views for a customer who was complaining when upgrading.

enum_values.name: MakeInteriorNgonVertexesSelectable
enum_values.summary: Set this to false if you only want boundary vertexes selectable when you run PointsOn. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62140

enum_values.name: MacDisplayOldVersionAutosaveWarning
enum_values.summary: Set this to true if you want to be warned about autosave for old file versions on Mac. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62359

enum_values.name: UseNewMissingFontUI
enum_values.summary: Set this to true if you want to be use the new missing font mapping UI. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-62642

enum_values.name: ExportDocumentUserText
enum_values.summary: Set to true to write document user text on Export and Copy/Paste. Set to false to not write document user text (default). https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-63589

enum_values.name: CommandsToIgnoreWhenAutoHidingToolPalettes
enum_values.summary: String list of command names to ignore when closing tool-palette on begin command. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-65131

enum_values.name: DisplayNonOriginModelBasepointWarning
enum_values.summary: Set this to true if you want to be warned about ModelBasepoints that are not set to the origin on open/import. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-67520

enum_values.name: UseEntireWidthForTopBand
enum_values.summary: Use the entire client width for top and bottom dock sites https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-67783

enum_values.name: UseMFCMenuBar
enum_values.summary: Experimenting with using a CMFCMenuBar to host main frame menu with a CMFCVisualManager derived class for styling the menu. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-70314

enum_values.name: IgnoreRUIPlatform
enum_values.summary: Will ignore the platforms attribute in RUI files when set. Requires restarting Rhino to take affect. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-70777

enum_values.name: EnableMcNeelOnlyFeatures
enum_values.summary: Enable McNeel only features for a particular user

enum_values.name: UseRhinoColorsForModalDialogs
enum_values.summary: Enable to use Eto Appearance page only

enum_values.name: AcadExportSelectUnexportableObjects
enum_values.summary: Set to true to select objects that could not be exported to DWG, either becuase the object was invalid or the exporter failed for whatever reason. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-77693

enum_values.name: AcadExportSortLayers
enum_values.summary: Temporary advanced settings for 8.x so no UI is required. Will be removed in 9.x when proper UI us added. https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-78977 https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-28804 https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-48103

enum_values.name: AcadExportWriteEmptyLayers
enum_values.summary: ditto

enum_values.name: DisableModelAndPageUnitsDifferDialog
enum_values.summary: Advanced settings to re-enable the units helper dialogs. see https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-81439

enum_values.name: DisablePageUnitsNotInchesOrMMDialog
enum_values.summary: ditto

enum_values.name: UseLegacyCurveJoiner
enum_values.summary: 6-May-2024 Dale Fugier, https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-81815

enum_values.name: UseLegacyBrepCapper
enum_values.summary: 13-Jun-2024 Dale Fugier, https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-82566

enum_values.name: HideFloatingWindowsOnDeactivate
enum_values.summary: 19-Sep-2024 Dale Fugier, https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-83845

enum_values.name: RecordAnimationTargetFolder
enum_values.summary: 14-Oct-2024 Nathan Letwory, https://mcneel.myjetbrains.com/youtrack/issue/RH-79386
